meta.title: Shintokuyama Ski Area
meta.description: Hidden JAPOW beside Tomamu & Sahoro — 7-min station walk · ¥2,000 all day.

hero.eyebrow: Shintoku, Hokkaido · walk from JR Shintoku
hero.title:
Shintokuyama
Ski Area
hero.tagline: Monopolize 32-degree uncompacted local powder at this hidden ¥2,000 gem near Sahoro and Tomamu.

sanctuary.title:
Beside Tomamu,
empty 32° runs.
sanctuary.lead: Minutes from Hoshino Tomamu and Sahoro Resort yet ¥2,000 per day and a 7-minute walk from the station—escape mega-resort prices and crowds with smart powder hunting.
sanctuary.noticeBody: The locally cut "Onodera burn" is the signature steep powder zone—don't hide aging lifts; win on snow quality and value.

primary.title: 32° × ¥2,000 × 7-min walk
primary.lead: Three hooks for overseas and domestic core skiers: station walk, all-day ¥2,000, and 32-degree uncompacted powder—without Tomamu ticket prices.
primary.imgAlt: Fresh powder on a compact municipal hill

secondary.title: Tomamu · Sahoro spillover
secondary.lead: Capture guests staying at mega-resorts who want cheap local powder—sleep at Tomamu, ski at Shintokuyama.

pass.title:
Multilingual LP
+ weather API.
pass.lead: Pair EN/CN landing pages with live snow status so travelers know instantly if today's powder is on—your fastest path to reaching international powder hunters.

hike.title:
After 16:00,
soba · onsen.
hike.lead: Lift-ticket stub discounts at local soba shops and onsen—the "Shintoku steam powder ticket" loop raises town ARPU after lifts close.
hike.leadCurry: Minatoya · Sekiguchi soba, Kuttarri Onsen Lake Inn, Tokachi Shintoku Onsen Waka—classic post-ski routes mapped on the LP.

tour.title:
From Shintoku Stn.,
half a day.
tour.lead: Day trip from Tomamu/Sahoro or stay in town—ski, eat soba, soak onsen in one Tokachi loop.

sanctuary.title: Hidden JAPOW guide
sanctuary.body: Next to Tomamu and Sahoro—capture spillover demand with ¥2,000, uncrowded, 32-degree local powder.

workation.title: JAPOW workation base
workation.body: Lodge Wi-Fi coworking concept—morning powder, afternoon remote, evening local chicken. Links to Shintoku workation guides.

lake.title: Tomamu · Sahoro pairing
lake.body: Stay mega-resort, ski Shintokuyama—split-stay model for crowd and cost control.

access.note: JR Nemuro Line Shintoku Stn. ~7 min walk · Doto Expwy Tomamu IC · lodge parking
access.rentacarLink: Book a rental car at New Chitose Airport
access.rentacarHint: For Tomamu, Obihiro, and Shintoku drives
